⚡ WVL
Scenarios › Third-Party
✕ Bad ✓ Good
BAD PATTERN
TBT FCP LCP INP

Sync Analytics, Eager YouTube, Instant Chat

Two synchronous scripts in <head> block HTML parsing for 1000ms. A full YouTube <iframe> loads immediately (hundreds of KB from google.com). A simulated chat widget blocks with another 200ms task on load.

Live Demo

This page was blocked for calculating… before you saw the first pixel. The YouTube iframe below loaded eagerly — check the Network tab to see how many requests it made.

💬 Chat Support
Blocking 200ms to initialise SDK…

❌ What's wrong

  • Analytics script in <head> with 600ms busy-loop — HTML parser stops completely. FCP delayed by 600ms before a single character renders.
  • Tag manager in <head> with 400ms block — another 400ms added to TBT. Total: 1000ms blocked before body starts parsing.
  • YouTube <iframe> loaded immediately — fetches JS, CSS, images and API calls from multiple google.com domains, competing for bandwidth with the LCP image.
  • Chat widget SDK initialised immediately with a 200ms block — fires during load, competes with user interaction, spikes INP.

✅ How to fix → good.html

  • Move all analytics/tag manager scripts out of <head> — load after window.load so they never block FCP.
  • Replace YouTube <iframe> with a Lite YouTube facade — show a thumbnail image, create the real iframe only when the user clicks Play.
  • Load chat widget SDK only on first mouseover of the chat button — the SDK never loads for users who don't need it.
  • Use async/defer + load-event gating for all remaining third-party scripts.
✕ The Bad Code
<!-- ✕ Sync analytics blocking <head> — 600ms --> <script> var s = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - s < 600) {} // blocks HTML parsing window.__analytics = { track: function(){} }; </script> <!-- ✕ Sync tag manager — 400ms more --> <script> var s = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - s < 400) {} </script> <!-- ✕ Eager YouTube iframe — downloads 500KB+ from google.com --> <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/VIDEO_ID" allow="autoplay" allowfullscreen></iframe> <!-- ✕ Chat SDK loaded immediately with 200ms block --> <script> var s = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - s < 200) {} // SDK init showChatWidget(); </script>
